iteration_1_interpretation: Iteration 1 supports an ecology demand model extracted from RC-agentic-ecology sources as target requirements only. It opens no implementation evidence, no positive ecology evidence, no prototype rows, and no native ant, colony, biological, sentience, or Phase 8 claim.
